title: hieracium viscosum subsp. lactucoides
intro: Hieracium viscosum subsp. lactucoides, also known as sticky hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium viscosum subsp. lactucoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in some traditional remedies, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
